summary: Tested dark mode footer CSS fix and SlideOver dark mode fix. Found and fixed a critical backend bug (422 on save) where _cap_string_lengths validator was applying 100-char limit to undeclared fields like quote_form_schema (870 chars). All 5 test scenarios passed after the backend fix.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: WebsiteSettingsUpdate._cap_string_lengths validator in models.py was iterating ALL input dict keys (including undeclared extra fields like quote_form_schema = 870 chars) and applying default 100-char limit. Fix: added `if key not in cls.model_fields: continue` to skip undeclared fields. This was blocking ALL footer saves with 422 Unprocessable Entity.

footer_dark_mode_css_variables.details: --aa-footer-text-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.72), --aa-footer-text-dim: rgba(255,255,255,0.42) correctly applied. Store footer text (tagline, nav links, contact) all readable on blue background.

slideover_dark_mode_panel.details: Panel bg=rgb(22,27,34)=#161b22=--aa-card. Title/description readable. Input fields show values. Save button bg=rgb(79,142,247)=#4f8ef7=--aa-primary (bright blue). Close button visible.

footer_save_functionality.details: After backend fix: PUT /api/admin/website-settings returns 200, toast shows 'Saved', tile preview updates, persistence confirmed after page reload.

slideover_close_button_dark_mode.details: Close (X) button visible in dark mode, color=rgb(100,116,139). Functional.

light_mode_regression.details: SlideOver bg=rgb(255,255,255)=white. Save button bg=rgb(15,23,42)=dark navy, color=white, visible. Close button visible. Save works with toast 'Saved'. Tile updates correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: WebsiteSettingsUpdate._cap_string_lengths model_validator (mode='before') iterated ALL keys in the incoming request dict, including extra/undeclared fields. The frontend sends quote_form_schema (870 chars) as part of the full website settings state. Since quote_form_schema was not in json_fields (100k limit), it defaulted to 100-char limit and raised ValueError.
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Added `if key not in cls.model_fields: continue` to skip validation of undeclared extra fields. Only declared model fields are now validated for length.
rca_of_the_issue.impact: This bug blocked ALL footer saves (and potentially other website settings saves) in both light and dark mode.

seed_data_creation: Test data: tagline updated to 'Light mode footer test' during testing. Can be changed back to any value.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode footer CSS fix and SlideOver fix both working correctly. Backend validator bug for quote_form_schema (422 on save) was found and fixed in models.py. All footer save operations now work in both dark and light mode. Test credential: partner=automate-accounts, email=admin@automateaccounts.local, pw=ChangeMe123!. Footer tagline was set to 'Light mode footer test' during testing.
